e.p: Did you check your email this morning?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn đã làm gì sáng nay (past simple).
2) Nói việc tiếp theo bạn sẽ làm (will/going to).
e.s: I checked my email this morning and I replied to one urgent message. I will finish the rest after the meeting.

e.p: Are you going to join the team meeting at 9?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có tham gia hay không (will/going to).
2) Nói lý do ngắn gọn (because / so).
e.s: I am going to join the meeting because I have an update. I will share my report then.

e.p: Which task did you finish yesterday?
e.m:
1) Nói việc bạn đã hoàn thành (past simple).
2) So sánh nó với một task khác nếu cần (more/less + adj hoặc -er).
e.s: I finished the client summary yesterday and it was quicker than writing the full report. It was less difficult than I expected.

e.p: Can you handle the new task now?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có thể làm ngay hay không (can/able to / will).
2) Nói bạn cần làm gì trước khi bắt đầu (have to/should).
e.s: I can handle it now but I will finish the current email first. I should save the files before I start.

e.p: Do you think we should change the morning routine?
e.m:
1) Nói ý kiến của bạn (should + V).
2) Nói một hành động bạn sẽ làm nếu thay đổi (will/going to).
e.s: We should start the meeting on time to save time. I will remind the team tomorrow.

e.p: What time was the meeting yesterday?
e.m:
1) Nói giờ họp đã diễn ra (past simple).
2) Nói bạn đến họp đúng giờ hay không (past simple).
e.s: The meeting was at 9 AM yesterday. I arrived on time and sat at my desk.

e.p: Who will lead the meeting today?
e.m:
1) Nói ai sẽ chủ trì (will + V).
2) Nói mục chính họ sẽ thảo luận (short noun phrase).
e.s: Anna will lead the meeting today. She will discuss the project deadline.

e.p: Can you present the sales update?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có thể trình bày hay không (can/will).
2) Nói bạn đã chuẩn bị gì (past simple).
e.s: I can present the sales update and I prepared the slides yesterday. I will speak for five minutes.

e.p: Should we shorten the meeting time?
e.m:
1) Nói ý kiến (should + V).
2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì nếu ngắn hơn (will + V).
e.s: Yes, we should shorten the meeting to thirty minutes. I will send a new agenda if we decide that.

e.p: What will you tell the team about the deadline?
e.m:
1) Nói thông tin chính về deadline (will + V).
2) Nói đề xuất bạn sẽ đưa ra (should/must/have to + V).
e.s: I will tell the team the deadline is next Friday. I will say we have to finish the draft by Wednesday.

e.p: Did you reply to the client email?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn đã trả lời hay chưa (past simple).
2) Nói nội dung ngắn bạn đã viết hoặc sẽ viết (one short clause).
e.s: I replied to the client email this morning. I confirmed the meeting time.

e.p: What will you write in your next email?
e.m:
1) Nói nội dung bạn sẽ viết (will + V).
2) Nói mục đích của email (to + V).
e.s: I will ask for the updated files. The email is to check the document status.

e.p: Which email was more urgent?
e.m:
1) Nói email nào quan trọng hơn (comparative).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: The client's email was more urgent than the newsletter. It was urgent because they need a quick reply.

e.p: Do you have to forward this message to Karen?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có phải chuyển tiếp hay không (have to/must).
2) Nói khi nào bạn sẽ làm (will + V).
e.s: I have to forward this message to Karen today. I will send it after I finish editing.

e.p: Can you summarize the email content for me?
e.m:
1) Tóm tắt ngắn nội dung chính (2 câu: main point + next step).
2) Nói bước tiếp theo bạn đề xuất (should/going to).
e.s: The email says the client wants a revised proposal. I suggest we make changes and I am going to draft the update.

d.t: Phân chia công việc trong nhóm

e.p: Who finished the design file?
e.m:
1) Nói ai đã hoàn thành (past simple).
2) Nói bạn đã làm gì liên quan nếu có (past simple).
e.s: Tom finished the design file yesterday. I reviewed his draft and gave feedback.

e.p: Can you take the client call this afternoon?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có thể nhận cuộc gọi hay không (can/will).
2) Nêu lý do nếu không thể và đề xuất thay thế (because / will + V).
e.s: I can take the client call this afternoon. If I am busy, I will ask Anna to join.

e.p: Who will write the report?
e.m:
1) Nói ai sẽ viết (will + V).
2) Nói deadline ngắn cho task (by + time / next + day).
e.s: I will write the report and it will be ready by Friday. I will finish the draft by Wednesday.

e.p: Is this task more difficult than the last one?
e.m:
1) So sánh hai task (comparative).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: This task is more difficult than the last one because it needs more data. It also takes more time.

e.p: Should we split the work into two parts?
e.m:
1) Nói ý kiến bạn (should + V).
2) Nói cách bạn sẽ chia (short plan, will + V).
e.s: Yes, we should split the work into two parts to save time. I will take the first part and Anna will take the second.

e.p: Did you meet the deadline last week?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có kịp hạn hay không (past simple).
2) Nói kết quả ngắn (success/failure + reason).
e.s: I met the deadline last week and I sent the files on time. I worked late to finish it.

e.p: When will the next deadline be?
e.m:
1) Nói thời gian deadline tiếp theo (will + time or date).
2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để chuẩn bị (will/going to).
e.s: The next deadline will be next Monday. I am going to prepare the data this weekend.

e.p: Do you have to ask for an extension?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có phải xin gia hạn hay không (have to/need to).
2) Nói lý do ngắn nếu có (because + clause).
e.s: I have to ask for an extension because the client sent new requirements. I will email them today.

e.p: Which task should be done first?
e.m:
1) Chỉ task ưu tiên (name task + should).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: We should finish the client report first because it has the nearest deadline. The other tasks can wait.

e.p: How will you prevent missing deadlines in the future?
e.m:
1) Nói một hành động bạn sẽ làm (will/going to).
2) Nói lợi ích ngắn của hành động đó (so / because).
e.s: I will set reminders and plan tasks weekly. This will help me avoid last-minute work.

e.p: Did you finish the report draft?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn đã hoàn thành hay chưa (past simple).
2) Nói một điểm chính trong báo cáo (short).
e.s: I finished the report draft yesterday. The main point is that sales increased by five percent.

e.p: What will you include in the final report?
e.m:
1) Liệt kê một hai nội dung chính (will + V).
2) Nói thứ tự bạn sẽ làm (first/then).
e.s: I will include the summary and the charts. First I will add the chart, then I will write the conclusion.

e.p: Can you make the report shorter?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có thể rút gọn không (can + V).
2) Nói cách bạn sẽ rút gọn (short method: remove / summarize).
e.h: Can + V; use verbs like remove/summarize
e.s: I can make the report shorter by summarizing each section. I will remove long examples.

e.p: Is the conclusion stronger than the introduction?
e.m:
1) So sánh conclusion và introduction (comparative).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: The conclusion is stronger than the introduction because it gives clear results. It also suggests next steps.

e.p: Should I add more data to the report?
e.m:
1) Đưa ý kiến (should + V).
2) Nói việc bạn sẽ làm nếu cần thêm dữ liệu (will + V).
e.s: Yes, you should add more data for clarity. I will collect two more charts tonight.

d.t: Yêu cầu giúp đỡ đồng nghiệp

e.p: Can you help me with this task?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có thể giúp hay không (can/will).
2) Nói bạn sẽ làm phần nào (short phrase).
e.s: I can help you with the task and I will check the figures. I will fix the chart.

e.p: Did you ask Tom for help yesterday?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn đã hỏi Tom hay chưa (past simple).
2) Nói kết quả (yes/no + short reason).
e.s: I asked Tom for help yesterday and he agreed. He gave me the contact list.

e.p: Who should I contact for IT support?
e.m:
1) Cho tên hoặc vị trí (should + contact).
2) Nói khi nào bạn sẽ liên hệ (will + time).
e.s: You should contact the IT helpdesk. I will call them this afternoon.

e.p: Do you need me to review your work?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có cần review hay không (need to/should).
2) Nói khi nào bạn cần (by + time).
e.s: I need you to review my summary by tomorrow. Please check it before noon.

e.p: How will you thank a colleague who helped you?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn sẽ cảm ơn bằng cách nào (will + V).
2) Nói lý do bạn cảm ơn ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: I will thank them in person and send a quick email. I am grateful because they saved me time.

d.t: Sắp xếp tài liệu và file

e.p: Did you save the file to the shared drive?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn đã lưu hay chưa (past simple).
2) Nói vị trí file nếu có (short).
e.s: I saved the file to the shared drive yesterday. It is in the Reports folder.

e.p: Where will you put the new documents?
e.m:
1) Nói chỗ bạn sẽ lưu (will + location).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (so/ because).
e.s: I will put the new documents in the Projects folder so everyone can access them. This will save time.

e.p: Can you find the old invoice quickly?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có thể tìm nhanh không (can + V).
2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì nếu không tìm thấy (will + V).
e.s: I can find the old invoice quickly because I know the folder. If I can't, I will ask accounting.

e.p: Is the new folder better than the old one?
e.m:
1) So sánh hai thư mục (comparative).
2) Nói vì sao (because + clause).
e.s: The new folder is better than the old one because it is organized by date. It is easier to find files.

e.p: Should we delete old files to save space?
e.m:
1) Nói ý kiến (should + V).
2) Nói bước bạn sẽ làm nếu đồng ý (will + V).
e.s: Yes, we should delete old files to save space. I will archive the important ones first.

e.p: Did you send the weekly update to the boss?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có gửi hay chưa (past simple).
2) Nói nội dung ngắn của update (short phrase).
e.s: I sent the weekly update to the boss yesterday. It included the project's current status.

e.p: What will you report in the next one?
e.m:
1) Nói hai điểm bạn sẽ báo cáo (will + V, two points).
2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để chuẩn bị (will/going to).
e.s: I will report progress and the remaining tasks. I am going to prepare a short slide.

e.p: Can I ask your approval for this budget?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có thể xin phê duyệt hay không (can/will).
2) Nói bạn cần gì từ sếp (short).
e.s: I can ask for approval this afternoon. I need the boss to approve the budget quickly.

e.p: Is this report more detailed than last month?
e.m:
1) So sánh hai báo cáo (comparative).
2) Nói một chi tiết cụ thể hơn (short).
e.s: This report is more detailed than last month's report because it has new charts. It shows weekly numbers.

e.p: Should I change the format before sending it?
e.m:
1) Đưa lời khuyên ngắn (should + V).
2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì nếu cần (will + V).
e.s: Yes, you should change the format to a PDF for clarity. I will convert it and send it tonight.

d.t: Sử dụng thiết bị văn phòng (in, máy scan)

e.p: Did you print the contract?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn đã in hay chưa (past simple).
2) Nói số bản hoặc nơi bạn để (short).
e.s: I printed the contract this morning. I left two copies on the manager's desk.

e.p: Can you scan this document for me?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có thể scan hay không (can + V).
2) Nói bạn sẽ gửi file bằng cách nào (will + V).
e.s: I can scan this document for you now. I will email the PDF to you.

e.p: Which printer is faster?
e.m:
1) Chỉ máy in nhanh hơn (comparative).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: The new printer is faster than the old one because it prints double-sided quickly. It handles large files better.

e.p: Do you have to replace the ink today?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có phải thay mực không (have to/must).
2) Nói khi nào bạn sẽ làm (will + V).
e.s: I have to replace the ink today because prints are faint. I will buy a new cartridge after lunch.

e.p: What will you do if the scanner stops working?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì đầu tiên (will + V).
2) Nói bước tiếp theo (contact/ask someone) (will/going to).
e.s: I will restart the scanner first to try to fix it. If it still fails, I will contact IT for help.

d.t: Quản lý nhiệm vụ cá nhân trong ngày

e.p: Did you finish your personal task today?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn đã hoàn thành hay chưa (past simple).
2) Nói việc tiếp theo bạn làm (short).
e.s: I finished my personal task this morning. Next, I will update my to-do list.

e.p: What are you going to do after lunch?
e.m:
1) Nói kế hoạch bạn sau bữa trưa (going to/will).
2) Nói thời gian bạn sẽ bắt đầu (at + time).
e.s: I am going to finish the draft after lunch. I will start at 1 PM.

e.p: Which task is more important today?
e.m:
1) Chỉ task quan trọng nhất (comparative/most).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: The client proposal is the most important task today because the deadline is close. It needs my full focus.

e.p: Do you have to leave early today?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có phải về sớm không (have to/can't).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (because + clause) hoặc thời gian bạn rời (at + time).
e.h: Have to + V; because / at + time
e.s: I have to leave early today because I have a dentist appointment. I will leave at 4 PM.

e.p: How will you organize your afternoon tasks?
e.m:
1) Nói hai bước bạn sẽ làm (first/then + will).
2) Nói lợi ích ngắn (so/ because).
e.s: First I will finish urgent emails, then I will work on the report. This will help me stay focused.

d.t: Giao tiếp nhẹ: hỏi về khối lượng công việc

e.p: Was your workload heavy yesterday?
e.m:
1) Nói công việc ngày hôm qua nặng hay nhẹ (past simple + adjective).
2) Nói một lý do ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: My workload was heavy yesterday because we had many meetings. I also had extra reports to finish.

e.p: Are you less busy today?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn bận hơn hay ít hơn (comparative: less/more).
2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì với thời gian rảnh (will + V).
e.s: I am less busy today than yesterday. I will review notes and answer emails.

e.p: Can I help if you are overloaded?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có cần giúp không (need/can).
2) Nói việc bạn muốn họ giúp (short task).
e.s: I need help with data entry if you can. Please check the spreadsheet for errors.

e.p: Which day is usually the busiest for you?
e.m:
1) Nói ngày bận nhất (name day).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: Friday is usually the busiest day for me because many reports are due. I also have more meetings then.

e.p: Should we balance the workload across the week?
e.m:
1) Nói ý kiến (should + V).
2) Nói hành động bạn sẽ làm để giúp cân bằng (will + V).
e.s: Yes, we should balance the workload across the week. I will create a simple schedule to share with the team.

d.t: Lên kế hoạch tuần làm việc

e.p: Did you plan your tasks for this week?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn đã lập kế hoạch hay chưa (past simple).
2) Nói một việc có trong kế hoạch (short).
e.s: I planned my tasks for this week yesterday. I included the client meeting on Thursday.

e.p: What will you prioritize this week?
e.m:
1) Nêu một hai ưu tiên (will + V, two items).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: I will prioritize the proposal and the monthly report. They are urgent because the deadline is near.

e.p: Can you block time for deep work?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có thể dành thời gian không (can + V).
2) Nói khi nào bạn sẽ block (at/from + time).
e.s: I can block time for deep work each morning. I will block from 9 to 11 AM.

e.p: Is this week busier than last week?
e.m:
1) So sánh hai tuần (comparative).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: This week is busier than last week because we have two deadlines. I also have more meetings.

e.p: How will you share the weekly plan with the team?
e.m:
1) Nói phương thức bạn sẽ dùng (will + V: email/meeting).
2) Nói thời gian bạn sẽ chia sẻ (on + day / by + time).
e.s: I will share the weekly plan by email. I will send it on Monday morning.

d.t: Ôn tập: Buổi sáng ở văn phòng

e.p: Did you arrive on time and check your messages?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn đến đúng giờ hay không (past simple).
2) Nói bạn đã kiểm tra tin nhắn hay email (past simple).
e.h: Past simple; two short past clauses
e.s: I arrived on time this morning and I checked my messages. I replied to one urgent email.

e.p: What will you do after the morning meeting?
e.m:
1) Nói kế hoạch ngay sau họp (will/going to).
2) Nói mục đích hành động đó (to + V / because).
e.h: Will/going to + V; to + V / because
e.s: After the morning meeting I will update the project plan. I will do this to keep the team informed.

e.p: Is replying to emails more important than preparing the slides?
e.m:
1) So sánh hai việc (comparative).
2) Nói bạn sẽ ưu tiên việc nào (will + V) và lý do ngắn.
e.s: Replying to emails is less important than preparing the slides if the slides are for the client. I will prepare the slides first.

e.p: Can you help organize the morning agenda?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn có thể giúp không (can + V).
2) Nói việc bạn sẽ làm để giúp (short, will + V).
e.s: I can help organize the morning agenda. I will list the topics and time for each item.

e.p: Should we change the start time to avoid rush hour?
e.m:
1) Nói ý kiến (should + V).
2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì nếu thay đổi (will + V).
e.s: Yes, we should change the start time to avoid rush hour. I will ask the team for their preferred time.

d.t: Ôn tập: Giải quyết vấn đề công việc

e.p: Did you identify the main problem with the project?
e.m:
1) Nói vấn đề chính bạn đã tìm ra (past simple).
2) Nói một nguyên nhân ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: I identified the main problem yesterday: we lacked clear data. It happened because the team missed some files.

e.p: What will you do to fix the issue?
e.m:
1) Nói hai bước bạn sẽ làm (first/then + will).
2) Nêu mục tiêu ngắn (to + V).
e.s: First I will gather the missing data, then I will update the report. This is to correct our numbers.

e.p: Can the team handle this without outside help?
e.m:
1) Nói họ có thể hay không (can + V).
2) Nói khi nào bạn sẽ xin giúp (will + V) nếu cần.
e.s: The team can handle most of it, but we will ask IT if a technical fix is needed. We will contact them tomorrow.

e.p: Is this problem worse than the last one?
e.m:
1) So sánh hai vấn đề (comparative).
2) Nói lý do ngắn (because + clause).
e.s: This problem is worse than the last one because it affects many files. It will take more time to fix.

e.p: Should we create a small task force to solve it?
e.m:
1) Đưa quyết định ngắn (should + V).
2) Nói ai bạn sẽ mời hoặc bạn sẽ làm gì (will + V).
e.s: Yes, we should create a small task force to solve it. I will invite two team members to help.

d.t: Ôn tập: Cuộc họp báo cáo tuần

e.p: Did you prepare your weekly summary for the meeting?
e.m:
1) Nói bạn đã chuẩn bị hay chưa (past simple).
2) Nói một điểm chính trong bản tóm tắt (short).
e.s: I prepared my weekly summary yesterday. One key point is the increase in user feedback.

e.p: Who will present the team results today?
e.m:
1) Nói ai sẽ trình bày (will + V).
2) Nói một nội dung họ sẽ báo cáo (short).
e.s: I will present the team results today. I will report on completed tasks and next steps.

e.p: Can we finish the meeting in thirty minutes?
e.m:
1) Nói có thể hay không (can + V).
2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để giúp rút ngắn (will + V).
e.s: We can finish the meeting in thirty minutes if everyone is concise. I will prepare a short agenda to help.

e.p: Is this week's performance better than last week?
e.m:
1) So sánh hai tuần (comparative).
2) Nói ví dụ ngắn chứng minh (short).
e.s: This week's performance is better than last week because we completed two extra tasks. For example, the report was finished earlier.

e.p: Should we set the same meeting time next week?
e.m:
1) Nói ý kiến (should + V).
2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để thông báo (will + V).
e.s: Yes, we should keep the same meeting time next week. I will send the calendar invite to everyone.
